title: aretia glutinosa
intro: Aretia glutinosa, also known as the wood sorrel or American sorrel, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its edible leaves that resemble a true sorrel. The medicinal properties of Aretia glutinosa include its high content of oxalic acid, which has been used to treat digestive issues, and its anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of consuming Aretia glutinosa include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Aretia glutinosa can be prepared as a tea, infused in water, or used as a cooking ingredient, allowing for various herbal preparations to be made from its leaves.
